title: galium helveticum var. baldense
intro: Galium helveticum var. baldense, also known as Alpine Bedstraw or Alpine Galium, is a perennial plant species in the bedstraw family (Rubiaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Galium helveticum var. baldense include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Galium helveticum var. baldense can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
